data.content:
Handoff capsule:
- Reproduction showed six /api/terminal/{sessionId} EventSource streams over HTTP/1.1 and multi-second browser queueing for ordinary API requests.
- Key files to touch: src/lib/session-connection-manager.ts, src/lib/terminal-api.ts, terminal API routes under src/app/api/terminal, and tests under src/lib/__tests__.
- Preferred fix is multiplexing one browser SSE connection and routing by sessionId, with bounded per-session buffers. Active-only streaming is a fallback but may miss background approval/failure events until selected.
- Add a script/manual probe that reports terminal event stream count, request protocol/durations, message/byte rate, and browser long tasks.
